query:
INSERT INTO workspace_timeline (workspaceId, event, eventType, createdAt) VALUES
(1, '01/11/2025 — DEVICE_CREATED event from IP 97.120.218.56/58. First visible account event.', 'case_event', '2025-01-11 00:00:00'),
(1, '01/20/2025 — DEBIT_CARD_FUNDING ($10) from IP 83.143.248.114 (New York, NY).', 'case_event', '2025-01-20 00:00:00'),
(1, '01/23/2025 — DEBIT_CARD_FUNDING ($100) from IP 82.118.177.250 (New York, NY).', 'case_event', '2025-01-23 00:00:00'),
(1, '02/11/2025 — CRYPTO_ORDER/TRANSFER activity from IP 130.195.219.196 (New York, NY).', 'case_event', '2025-02-11 00:00:00'),
(1, '02/12/2025 — CRYPTO_TRANSFER activity from IP 130.195.213.134 (New York, NY).', 'case_event', '2025-02-12 00:00:00'),
(1, '09/09/2025 — LIQUIDATION PHASE (6:49 AM – 6:51 AM): Three equity sell orders (one cancelled) from IP 89.116.218.6 with generic "United States" location tag — anomalous, never seen before.', 'critical_event', '2025-09-09 06:49:00'),
(1, '09/09/2025 — THEFT PHASE (9:32 AM – 9:33 AM): USDC purchase and withdrawal of $1,289 from IP 23.249.172.42 (New York, NY).', 'critical_event', '2025-09-09 09:32:00'),
(1, '04/28/2026 — Claimant''s Original Disputed Discovery Request sent to Robinhood (Exhibit 1).', 'legal_action', '2026-04-28 00:00:00'),
(1, '07/07/2026 — Robinhood''s counsel Simeon Schopf sends email objecting to discovery requests as "interrogatories" under FINRA Rule 12507(a)(1) and refusing to provide further data (Exhibit 2).', 'legal_action', '2026-07-07 00:00:00'),
(1, '07/13/2026 — Deadline for meet and confer call passed without resolution.', 'deadline', '2026-07-13 00:00:00'),
(1, '07/15/2026 — Forensic analysis completed: IP 89.116.218.6 and "United States" location tag appear ONLY on Sept 9, contradicting Robinhood''s consistency claim.', 'milestone', '2026-07-15 00:00:00'),
(1, '07/15/2026 — Robinhood rejects $5,500 counteroffer and increases settlement offer to $800, maintaining device token hash matches Claimant.', 'legal_action', '2026-07-15 00:00:00'),
(1, '07/15/2026 — Evidence bundle organized: Exhibits 1, 2, 3 prepared. Deliverables A, B, C (forensic reports) completed.', 'milestone', '2026-07-15 00:00:00');
SELECT ROW_COUNT() AS inserted;
